3137850.name: Mystical Riddles: Haunted Portraits Collector's Edition Demo
3137850.description: Don’t let him take what’s left of your humanity! You may not be a photographer, but you have the most extraordinary camera in your use, so you might as well learn something helpful by attending one of the exhibitions of the outstanding photographer Oliver Cook. It's quite strange since nobody had ever heard of this name before and suddenly the man became a true genius. The characters in his work really look so alive, as if they are about to step out of the frame and share a few secrets with you. Discover the secret of his unbelievable success and don't let it fade away with the appearance of ugly rumors about people disappearing in his celebrated gallery.
3137850.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
